name: Editorial
description: Magazine-cover feel — refined serif, generous whitespace, restrained palette
use_for: long-form essays, op-eds, thoughtful explainers, founder-letter content

accent.role: drop caps, pull-quotes, single emphasis line

flux.positive_prefix: Editorial 3:2 magazine-cover photograph, single hero subject with generous clean negative space, soft directional natural light, muted editorial palette, photographic-document register (Vogue / The New Yorker cover photography sensibility).
flux.positive_suffix: Subject occupies 35–55% of frame; large clean margin on the top-left or top-right for headline overlay; soft background with low object density; magazine-cover crop with breathing room.

always_add: single hero subject, generous clean negative space
magazine-cover crop with headline-safe top margin
low background object density, breathing room around subject

native_canvas.rationale: magazine-cover photography (Vogue / The New Yorker) — 3:2 is the editorial print register; 1248×832 = FLUX-trained 3:2 bucket, both dims /16
